summary: Phase 4b full pass: 24/26 backend pytest cases PASS on cold run + all admin/report/regression tests re-pass cleanly after OTP throttle cooldown. The 2 pytest 'failures' are NOT product bugs — they are watch-endpoint IP rate-limit exhaustion (5/hr/IP) from repeated successful test runs; backend logs confirm price-drop notifications are firing correctly ([FCM DEV] push … 'Price dropped on …' body='Now ₹700.') and the dedup 24h logic path is exercised. Frontend E2E as admin (9999999999): /admin dashboard renders live analytics (99 users, 32 vendors, 36 active listings, 12 deals, ₹49,500 GMV, 3 pending KYC, 4 open reports); /admin/reports lists 4 open reports with SPAM tag + Takedown/Warn/Dismiss actions; /admin/users lists 40 users with Ban/Freeze buttons + search input; /admin/listings shows TAKEN DOWN pill + Restore action + Taken-down tab filter. /feed renders 5 SPONSORED badges on boosted listings. All required data-testids present: link-admin-users, link-admin-listings, link-admin-reports, stat-open-reports, admin-reports-tab-open, admin-users-search. No console errors on any admin page.

minor.issue: Anonymous watch endpoint IP rate-limit remainder reported as ~3233s (~54min) after 5 successful watches — this is per-IP not per-listing so re-running Phase-4b price-drop tests from same egress IP within 1h will 429. Consider scoping rate-limit per (IP, listing) OR shortening window, OR bumping cap to 10 for dev preview. Not a product bug.

OTP throttle 3/phone/10min bites hard on the seeded admin phone (9999999999) when back-to-back suites re-authenticate. Consider whitelisting admin phone in dev, or exposing dev-mode 'refresh admin token' helper.

issues: Target field prints raw mongo id (e.g. 'Target: 6a540dc6bd19e6bceff347f8') instead of resolving to listing title/user handle — admin has to open new tab to know what content is being reported. Minor UX.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Loosen or scope-narrow the /listings/{id}/watch IP rate limit to make CI-style repeated Phase-4b runs green out of the box (or reset between runs).
OPTIONAL: Resolve Target ids to human labels on /admin/reports card for better admin UX.
OPTIONAL: Add data-testid='dashboard-admin-cta' on /dashboard admin quick-link if not already (found on /admin route but not on /me dashboard).
critical_code_review_comments: boost_service: verify boost_expires_at extension uses max(now, current_expires) + delta (already appears to since duplicate INR boost test asserted after > before).
reports/{id}/resolve should surface Reason + Note back on GET so /admin/reports?status=resolved shows why-taken-down (partial today).
watcher_notify_service dedup uses (phone, listing_id) 24h — good; but if the same registered user has two phones (edge), they'd get double-notified. Low priority.
First-topup bonus fires on wallet_service.deposit_inr which is invoked via simulate-success — real razorpay webhook path should also route through deposit_inr to ensure bonus fires in prod. Confirm.

Ban check happens in require_auth path — good. But actively logged-in banned users with an already-issued access token keep working until token expires; token rotation on ban is not implemented (acceptable for MVP).

success_rate.backend: 24/26 = 92% cold-run; 100% when segmented to avoid IP-rate-limit collision (Admin+Reports+Regression re-run: 14/14 PASS)
success_rate.frontend: 100% smoke on all Phase-4b admin routes + Sponsored badge rendering; ListingDetail boost/report modal not exercised via UI due to admin-OTP re-throttle mid-run (previously verified backend paths via curl)

test_credentials: Admin phone 9999999999 (dev OTP). Buyer/Vendor auto-generated 98xx/98xx/98xx with unix-time last 4 digits. Same as prior iterations.
seed_data_creation: Cumulative across iterations: 40 TEST_ users, ~30 TEST_ listings (TEST_Boost_*, TEST_Watch_*, TEST_Reported_*, TEST_Takedown_*), 5 currently boosted listings (SPONSORED in feed), 4 open reports, 3 pending KYC. Live counts on /admin dashboard.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To rerun Phase 4b cleanly: (1) wait ~10min between full runs to clear OTP + watch IP rate-limits, OR (2) run TestBoost/TestFcm/TestHelpful/TestFirstTopupBonus/TestRegression subsets which don't touch the watch endpoint. Command: `cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_phase4b.py -v -o 'addopts=' --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/phase4b.xml`. Frontend E2E requires admin login via localStorage keys 'emergent_access_token'/'emergent_refresh_token'/'emergent_user' (NOT 'access_token'). Live preview: https://emergent-india-2.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca of the issue: N/A — no product-level bugs surfaced. Pytest failures are external state pollution (IP/phone rate-limits from prior successful runs), not code bugs. Backend logs confirm all Phase 4b flows (boost activation, price-drop watcher notification with FCM push + MSG91 SMS stub, first-topup +50 bonus firing exactly once on ₹200+ within 24h) executed successfully during the test run.
